india_trends.title: Solar stock Fujiyama Power Systems rise 6% amid stock market rally. Do you own?
india_trends.summary: Fujiyama Power Systems shares rose nearly 6% on April 15, reflecting positive market trends. Investor sentiment improved due to declining crude oil prices. The company also faced a BIS inspection, leading to product seizures, while announcing a new solar cell plant in UP to boost production.

india_trends.title: India’s wholesale inflation at multi-year high of 3.88% in March; up from 2.13% in February
india_trends.summary: India’s wholesale price inflation rose to a 12-month high of 3.88% in March from 2.13% in February, exceeding expectations, while retail inflation also edged up to 3.4%.

india_trends.title: Infosys, TCS, Wipro, other IT stocks climb up to 5%. Here's why
india_trends.summary: IT stocks rallied up to 5% on Wednesday, driven by improved market sentiment on hopes of fresh Iran-US talks and easing concerns around AI disruption. After earlier losses due to AI and inflation worries, the sector is seeing a partial recovery, with Nifty IT emerging as a top gainer.

india_trends.summary: For FY2026, the insurer posted a 34.6 per cent rise in profit after tax to ₹1,600 crore. Value of New Business grew 10.9 per cent to ₹2,629 crore, with margins expanding 190 basis points to 24.7 per cent
